heading: Effect on other Federal authority
label: 4007 Effect on other Federal authority
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior was renumbered section 609 and is classified to .section 608 of Pub. L. 105–383section 4008 of this title

children.heading: Authority preserved
children.label: a Authority preserved
children.text: Nothing in this chapter supersedes or limits the authority of any agency to carry out its responsibilities and missions under other laws.

children.heading: Regulatory authority
children.label: b Regulatory authority
children.text: Nothing in this chapter may be construed as establishing new regulatory authority for any agency.
